subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The divine companions are present, and all are interceding for the writing of this letter. This servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی یاران رحمانی حاضر و جمیع وساطت نگارش این نامه مینمایند این عبد
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
